text.title: rerank-before-reasoning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rerank-before-reasoning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Fixed K=10 inherited from a single-stage RAG quickstart.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: K=10 collapses the two-stage pattern back to a single stage; the reranker has nothing to rerank.

failure-mode.description: Bolting a hosted reranker onto a single-stage pipeline without an eval harness.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without measurement, the reranker may be making things worse on your data — public-benchmark leaders sometimes lose on niche corpora.
